module simd_store64_lane.0.wasm
assert_return v128.store64_lane_0 i32:0 v128:00010203040506070000000000000000 -> i64:506097522914230528
assert_return v128.store64_lane_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000102030405060708 -> i64:578437695752307201
assert_return v128.store64_lane_0_offset_0 v128:00010203040506070000000000000000 -> i64:506097522914230528
assert_return v128.store64_lane_1_offset_1 v128:00000000000000000102030405060708 -> i64:578437695752307201
assert_return v128.store64_lane_0_align_1 i32:0 v128:00010203040506070000000000000000 -> i64:506097522914230528
assert_return v128.store64_lane_0_align_2 i32:0 v128:00010203040506070000000000000000 -> i64:506097522914230528
assert_return v128.store64_lane_0_align_4 i32:0 v128:00010203040506070000000000000000 -> i64:506097522914230528
assert_return v128.store64_lane_0_align_8 i32:0 v128:00010203040506070000000000000000 -> i64:506097522914230528
assert_return v128.store64_lane_1_align_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000102030405060708 -> i64:578437695752307201
assert_return v128.store64_lane_1_align_2 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000102030405060708 -> i64:578437695752307201
assert_return v128.store64_lane_1_align_4 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000102030405060708 -> i64:578437695752307201
assert_return v128.store64_lane_1_align_8 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000102030405060708 -> i64:578437695752307201
assert_invalid simd_store64_lane.1.wasm
assert_invalid simd_store64_lane.2.wasm
assert_invalid simd_store64_lane.3.wasm
